provenance.snippet: Entreat is a live album by British altemative rock band The Cure , recorded at London 's Wembley Arena in July 1989 . It consists entirely of songs performed from the band 's 1989 record Disintegration ; while they were on their intemational Prayer tour . Entreat was distributed exclusively in Franc
